spec.name: The Quadruple Junction Under The Dump
spec.description: You are standing in something that reminds you of an entry to an ant hive. There are enormous concrete pipes leading north, south, east and west. There is also a metal ladder built into the concrete wall leading up through a layer of garbage.

north.description: To the north you can see a huge triple junction with sewer pipes leading west and east.

east.description: East. You can see a pit in the floor.

south.description: To the south there is a huge junction with pipes leading east and west.

west.description: To the west there is an odd looking room with totally smooth walls.

up.description: Up through the garbage you can just make out what looks like the dump in Midgaard.

extra_descs.description: It looks as if it is made of stainless steel, and it would function as a club of considerable power, but alas... You can't take at all since it is firmly set into the concrete wall.
